text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the spring Tenno Sho is here.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yoo-hoo! ♪ Mayano!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, Teio! Did you come to cheer me on?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Hishiama and I finished up all our tasks, so
we dashed over here!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Everyone's so excited to see you race!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Just take a look!

text_block_list.name: News Site
text_block_list.text:
"The spring Tenno Sho—the Ultimate Face-off?!"
"Who Will Win? Brian or Mayano?"

text_block_list.name: News Site
text_block_list.text:
"Hanshin Daishoten's Fierce Battle Rages toward
The Shield!" "Who Will Shine Brightest? Superstar
Brian or Rising Star Mayano?"

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Are you excited? Nervous?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
There's no way something like that would scare
me! Of course I'm excited!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Now that's Maya for you! I totally
underestimated you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! I'll accept some pudding as an
apology! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heehee. Now then, Trainer... I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I won't!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get a perfect victory over Brian this
time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You'd better look forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After I send Mayano Top Gun off...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, Hishiama? Mayano's already left.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Did you guys see the news?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You mean the headlines about Brian? I showed
them to Mayano...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
No, I mean the video that was released just a
moment ago.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Anyway... Take a look at this, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She passes me her smart phone open on a video
from a news site.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Is it true, Brian? After this year's spring Tenno
Sho, you're—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'll be training for the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
B-but... the Arima is in winter. Isn't it too early to
make such a decisi—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: No.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I have some things I need to make sure of, and I
need the time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I must know how far I, Narita Brian, can run!
